desc: Larnaca is Cyprus at its easiest: a compact palm-lined seafront city where airport access, beach, old church quarter, diving and winter-sun practicality all sit within a very manageable footprint. It is less about dramatic headline sights than about smooth, low-friction Mediterranean time, which makes it especially strong for short breaks and easy shoulder-season sun.

todo.name: Finikoudes promenade
todo.desc: Use the palm-lined waterfront for easy beach time, cafes and evening walks without transfer hassle.

todo.name: Larnaca Salt Lake
todo.desc: Visit in the cooler season for flamingos and open views near Hala Sultan Tekke.

todo.name: Zenobia wreck dive
todo.desc: Certified divers can plan around one of the Mediterranean's best-known wreck dives.

todo.name: St Lazarus Church
todo.desc: Step into the stone church and surrounding old streets for Larnaca's historic core.

todo.name: Hala Sultan Tekke with Salt Lake walk
todo.desc: Pair the mosque setting with the lake trail rather than treating the birdlife and the monument as separate stops.

todo.name: Piale Pasha evening walk
todo.desc: Keep going beyond Finikoudes for a less package-holiday seafront stretch with local fish taverns and a calmer pace.

wifi.note: Excellent across most hotels, apartments and seafront cafes, so Larnaca is one of the lower-friction places here for simple work-and-holiday overlap.

prac.fltNote: Larnaca's biggest advantage is that the airport is genuinely part of the destination rather than a distant gateway, and easyJet is currently operating Larnaca-London Gatwick service. That keeps the destination-level LGW nonstop truth as `true`. Prices still jump around school holidays and warm shoulder-season weekends, but the short airport transfer makes Larnaca more forgiving than most resort-style sun breaks.
prac.lang: Greek and Turkish; English is widely used in tourism
prac.visa: British citizens can visit Cyprus visa-free for up to 90 days in any 180-day period, and GOV.UK says your passport must be less than 10 years old on arrival, valid for at least 3 months after the day you plan to leave, and have at least 1 blank page. Cyprus is not in Schengen and you do not register for EES when entering.
alerts: Beachfront rooms are most expensive during UK school-holiday sun weeks.
Salt Lake birdlife is seasonal, not a summer guarantee.
Midday heat is strong from June through September.
Cyprus is outside Schengen, so do not assume mainland-Europe border rules apply one-for-one.

sweet: May, September and October are usually Larnaca's sweet spot for warm sea weather, active restaurant life and lower pressure than the most intense midsummer weeks.
